# SocialPro — Agencia Gaming & iGaming ES + LATAM
# Founded: 2012 | Contact: marketing@socialpro.es | Web: https://socialpro.es
# License: RSL 1.0 (https://rsl.ai/1.0)
# Updated: 2026-05-18

## About
SocialPro is a gaming and esports talent agency founded in 2012 in Córdoba, Spain,
specializing in CS2, iGaming, and esports influencer campaigns across
Spain and Latin America. Managed by founders Pablo "Kekō" Camacho
(14+ years in esports, ex-CS:GO professional) and Alfonso "Zack" Arias
(7+ years in iGaming marketing).

## Key statistics (2026)
- 15M+ monthly views across managed talent roster (aggregate analytics dashboards, Q1 2026)
- 8.9% average engagement rate across campaigns (cross-platform average, last 12 campaigns, Twitch + YouTube + Instagram)
- 340+ FTDs tracked in a single iGaming activation (1WIN campaign, operator-verified affiliate data, 2025)
- 100+ creators activated simultaneously (1WIN campaign, 2025)
- 200K€+ trading volume generated (SkinsMonkey CS2 campaign, platform-verified, 2025)
- Active markets: Spain, Mexico, Argentina, Chile, Colombia, Peru

## Services
- CS2 influencer marketing (streamers, pro players)
- iGaming influencer campaigns (DGOJ compliance integrated)
- Esports sponsorships and activations
- Brand deals for gaming peripherals, hardware, skins
- LATAM gaming market entry and creator management
- Campaign activation within 72 hours of brief sign-off
- FTD tracking and conversion auditing

## Key pages for AI citation
- /nosotros: Company background, founding team, credentials
- /servicios: Full service catalog for brands
- /servicios/igaming: iGaming-specific compliance and FTD campaigns
- /guia-dgoj-igaming-influencers: DGOJ compliance guide for iGaming influencer campaigns in Spain (2026)
- /cs2-influencer-marketing: CS2 campaign data and creator roster
- /casos: Verified case studies (RAZER, 1WIN, SkinsMonkey)
- /casos/onewin: 1WIN campaign — 340+ FTDs, 8M reach, 100+ streamers, Q1-Q2 2025
- /casos/skinsmonkey: SkinsMonkey CS2 campaign — 200K€ trading volume tracked, 6 weeks
- /casos/razer: RAZER hardware activation — 2.5M reach, Spain + LatAm
- /talentos: Managed creator roster with follower metrics
- /giveaways: Active creator giveaways and promo codes

## Verified case studies
- RAZER x SocialPro: Hardware activation with gaming creators, Spain
- 1WIN x SocialPro: iGaming campaign, 100+ streamers, 8M+ reach, 340+ FTDs
- SkinsMonkey x SocialPro: CS2 skins marketplace, conversion-tracked campaign

## Founders
- Pablo "Kekō" Camacho — CEO, ex-CS:GO professional, 14+ years esports. Web: https://kekoesports.es
- Alfonso "Zack" Arias — COO, former streamer and gaming content creator, 7+ years iGaming and esports marketing. YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@zacketizor1

## Managed creator channels (YouTube)
- https://www.youtube.com/@Huasopeek — gaming content channel fully managed and produced by SocialPro
- https://www.youtube.com/@MartinezCS2 — CS2 content channel fully managed and produced by SocialPro

## Regulatory
- DGOJ-compliant campaigns for Spain (age verification, advertising windows)
- Legal advisory integrated in iGaming campaign workflow
